message:
Running command: echo "=== Current state of all related processes ==="
ps aux | grep -E "yosys|abc|librelane|openroad" | grep -v "bash\|grep" | awk '{print $1, $8, $3, $4, $11}' | head -15
echo ""
pgrep -f "yosys-abc" | head -5
echo "---"
ls -la /proc/363476/fd 2>/dev/null | grep "pipe\|abc" | head -10
echo ""
echo "=== Is ABC inside Yosys process? ==="
pgrep -P $(pgrep -f "yosys.*synthesize" | head -1) 2>/dev/null | while read p; do
  echo "child $p: $(cat /proc/$p/comm 2>/dev/null)"
done

{"command": "echo "=== Current state of all related processes ==="

echo ""

echo "---"
ls -la /proc/363476/fd 2>/dev/null | grep "pipe\|abc" | head -10
echo ""
echo "=== Is ABC inside Yosys process? ==="
pgrep -P $(pgrep -f "yosys.*synthesize" | head -1) 2>/dev/null | while read p; do
  echo "child $p: $(cat /proc/$p/comm 2>/dev/null)"
done", "timeout": 10}
function.name: execute_bash
